turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
﻿
In the medical field, a could house the pre-
information, lower level data of the data pyramid.
A. patient chart
C. patient prescription
B. patient medical plan
D. general monitor

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
﻿
The process of gathering large amounts of Internet (Web) data is called
A. data cleaning
B. data scraping
C. data analytics
D. data gathering

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
﻿
Big data websites generate data at the
level of
the data pyramid?
A. middle
C. bottom
B. top
D. second

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: B. top. Big data websites generate a large amount of data, which falls under the top level of the data pyramid, including structured, semi-structured, and unstructured data.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
﻿
In order to convey information to someone who needs it, data often has to be
A. presented in raw form
B. presented visually
C. presented in numbers
D. compressed

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
B. presented visually. 

Visual presentation of data enables better understanding and interpretation of the information. It can take the forms of charts, graphs, diagrams, and maps. This can help convey complex data in a simple and easy-to-understand way.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
﻿
A _________
is the common
name of a computer file composed of rows and columns for storing and organizing data.
A. spreadsheet
C. budget
B. balance sheet
D. list

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
A. spreadsheet. 

A spreadsheet is a computer file composed of rows and columns that allows you to organize, manipulate, and analyze data. It can perform calculations, create charts and graphs, and perform a range of other functions. It is commonly used in business, finance, and science.
